name: Presence Lighting (bedroom)
summary: mmWave presence + time-of-day lighting for the bedroom. Ceiling node (ESP32 + LD2410C + 2-ch relay) drives the 6 concealed bulbs; desk node (ESP32-C3 + MOSFET) power-cycles the BT LED strip. Modes: Day->cool, Evening->warm, Sleep (iPhone Focus)->strip only.
safety: Relay board wired in series AFTER the wall switches, which are parked ON as master cut-offs — switch OFF = everything dead for maintenance.
Relays default OFF at boot so a power blip won't blast lights at 3AM.
Mains work at the ceiling done with the wall switch OFF.
